'''Camp Culroon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]]. [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]] was assigned there and developed the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] ''[[Blizzard 1/Legends|Blizzard 1]]'' prior to the [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|Battle of Zaloriis]].

==Description==
Camp Culroon was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research base that had been set up on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]] prior to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The base was secluded away from population centers such as [[Zaloriis City]], and was protected by a wall. The base had two [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]]s, four watch towers, a power core, a [[Research Center]], and a landing pad.

==History==
The [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] ''[[Blizzard 1/Legends|Blizzard 1]]'', designed by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]] was constructed at the camp. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] rescued Colonel Veers from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who had captured him. Veers directed Vader to lead him back to Culroon where he took control of ''Blizzard 1'' and part of the base's defense force. They then returned to [[Fondor II]], a nearby Imperial base where ''Blizzard 1'' was outfitted for the [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|assault]] on Zaloriis City.

==Behind the scenes==
Camp Culroon appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' during the Darth Vader campaign. The campaign is also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
